issues.description: Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. The card retrieves from trash ('from your trash'), not deck. Should be 'TrashFromHand' or equivalent trash-to-hand action, but DSL lacks explicit trash-search action. Use custom handler or clarify with 'SearchTrash' if supported.
Filter missing card type constraint. Text specifies 'purple Event' but filter only includes cost. Must add filter condition for card type 'Event' and type color 'Purple'.
Missing second action entirely. Card text includes 'Then, set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' (Rest action to flip DON!!), but DSL contains no such action.
DON!! cost payment (−1) not represented. While optional mechanics ('You may') may be implicit, the DON!! payment mechanic should be documented or acknowledged if system supports it.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] DON!! −1: Add up to 1 purple Event with a cost of 5 or less from your trash to your hand. Then, set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.
